invariants: Agentflow remains a model-agnostic workflow and proof microkernel.
The roadmap stays scoped to protocol, proof, safety, and interoperability work rather than full agent orchestration.
non_goals: Do not implement any roadmap items in this task.
Do not add OpenHands as a dependency.
Do not add review-cycle integration beyond GitHub issue creation.
objective: Create prioritized GitHub tickets from the OpenHands feature analysis and update the Agentflow roadmap.
rollback_plan: Close or retitle the created GitHub issues if necessary and revert docs/roadmap.md to the previous roadmap ordering.
scope: Create specialized Agentflow GitHub issues for the best OpenHands-derived opportunities.
Prioritize the new work in docs/roadmap.md.
Record the roadmap edit through Agentflow receipts and verify the run.

steps.action: Create prioritized GitHub tickets and update roadmap.
expected_diff: GitHub issues created for OpenHands-derived Agentflow opportunities.
docs/roadmap.md updated with a prioritized OpenHands-derived opportunity section.
preconditions: OpenHands feature analysis identified hook, event, security, stuck-loop, plugin, proof viewer, CI, and MCP-status opportunities.
